g.title: Assembly: shaft + disks + bearings + seals
Multiple rotors coupled by gears or couplings
Mechanical properties: E, G, ρ, ν
Shaft elements (Timoshenko) Cylindrical or tapered
Rigid disks Mass and moments of inertia
Bearings: isotropic, anisotropic Ball, Roller, Magnetic, PlainJournal, TiltingPad
Seals: Labyrinth, HolePattern, Hybrid
Concentrated masses
Coupling between shafts
Gears with mesh forces
Static analysis Deformation, reactions, internal forces
Modal analysis Natural frequencies, mode shapes Damping, logarithmic decrement
Campbell diagram Natural frequencies vs. speed Critical speed identification
Critical speeds Synchronous resonance speeds
Undamped critical speed map Critical speeds vs. bearing stiffness
API 617 Level 1 stability analysis
Frequency response function (FRF)
Unbalance response Bode, deflected shape, orbits
Time response Transient, run-up, coast-down State-space or Newmark
Harmonic balance method Periodic steady-state response
run_rubbing() - Rotor-stator contact run_crack() - Transverse crack run_misalignment() - Misalignment
Bode diagrams, Campbell, UCS 2D/3D mode shapes, orbits Deflected shape, FFT
Natural frequencies, damping ratios Displacements, forces, moments NumPy arrays for post-processing
